Metadata

compose_path tests\fixtures\docker-compose.bad.yml

Issues

CRITICAL (6)

DC-002 critical
Component: compose/web
Service runs as root or has no 'user' defined
DC-002 critical
Component: compose/api
Service runs as root or has no 'user' defined
DC-003 critical
Component: compose/api
Service exposes a plaintext password or secret in environment variables
DC-002 critical
Component: compose/db
Service runs as root or has no 'user' defined
DC-003 critical
Component: compose/db
Service exposes a plaintext password or secret in environment variables
DC-002 critical
Component: compose/cache
Service runs as root or has no 'user' defined

MEDIUM (5)

DC-001 medium
Component: compose/web
Service uses an image with ':latest' tag or no tag
DC-004 medium
Component: compose/web
Service exposes a port on all interfaces (0.0.0.0) or a sensitive port
DC-001 medium
Component: compose/api
Service uses an image with ':latest' tag or no tag
DC-001 medium
Component: compose/db
Service uses an image with ':latest' tag or no tag
DC-001 medium
Component: compose/cache
Service uses an image with ':latest' tag or no tag

Recommendations

DC-001 medium

Pin service images to a specific version tag to ensure reproducible deployments.

DC-002 critical

Define a non-root 'user' for each service (e.g. user: '1000').

DC-004 medium

Bind ports to a specific interface (e.g. 127.0.0.1:8080:80) and avoid exposing privileged ports externally.

DC-003 critical

Use Docker secrets or a .env file instead of hardcoding credentials in docker-compose.yml.

Performance

duration_s 0.0115
DockCheck — Static analysis tool for Docker environments
